summary: Iteration 5 (multi-page capture) testing complete. Backend: NEW pages:[] shape, legacy single-file shape, empty pages 400, pages-with-PDF expansion, and 3-page Chinese all green via pytest (5/5). Frontend: /camera web fallback shows Choose-from-library + 'Done · N' multi-pick + navigates to /analyzing. Onboarding boots cleanly. /scan -> /camera, /upload, /reminder (5 presets), /settings (toggle visible) all confirmed.

ui_bugs.issue: The Save originals toggle renders visually but no element with data-testid='settings-save-originals' was found. Tap test could not be performed by selector. Visual screenshot confirms the toggle (off state) is rendered. Add testID to the Switch in app/settings.tsx to make it testable.

react_native_issues.issue: Pre-existing warning '[expo-notifications] Listening to push token changes is not yet fully supported on web.' Carry-over, not new.
Pre-existing warning '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Carry-over from theme.ts shadow tokens.

Warning when /camera mounts: 'useNativeDriver is not supported because the native animated module is missing.' Cosmetic only — the flashAnim/tipFade animations still play with JS driver. Could be wrapped in Platform.OS!=='web' check or set useNativeDriver:false on web.

action_items: (Optional) Add testID='settings-save-originals' to the Switch component on /settings so the toggle can be flipped programmatically by future tests.
(Optional) On /camera, gate the Animated.timing(...,{useNativeDriver:true}) calls behind Platform.OS!=='web' (or set useNativeDriver:false on web) to silence the noisy warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py AnalyzeRequest accepts BOTH legacy {file_base64, mime_type} and the new {pages:[{file_base64,mime_type}]}. Order of evaluation: req.pages truthy first, else fall back to legacy single-file, else 400. An EMPTY pages array hits the legacy branch and correctly returns 400 'No file content provided' — verified.

server.py MAX_TOTAL_PAGES=20 cap is enforced across the union of expanded PDF pages + image pages. Each PDF page entry contributes up to min(5, remaining budget) pages — verified by the pages-with-pdf test.
server.py records mime_type from req.pages[0].mime_type when pages[] is used. Storing 'application/pdf' for pages whose first entry was a PDF is consistent and confirmed.

camera.tsx web fallback correctly renders 'Choose from library' + 'Done · N' with testIDs camera-pick-library-web and camera-web-done. Picker uses allowsMultipleSelection so a single library invocation can add multiple pages. Done button navigates router.replace('/analyzing') after setPendingAnalysis({pages}).
camera.tsx native multi-shot path (CameraView + thumbStrip + camera-thumb-remove-{i}) is unchanged and not testable from web preview as expected.

api.ts analyzeDocument signature matches the new backend payload exactly: {device_id, target_language, pages:AnalyzePage[]}. Legacy single-file is no longer reachable from the frontend (upload.tsx must wrap as a 1-page array).

success_rate.backend: 100% (5/5 pytest in test_iter5_multipage.py: two-image combined, 3-page Chinese, legacy single-file + listing, empty pages array -> 400, pages with PDF entry expanded). Iter 4 suite (test_klarpost_api.py + test_multipage_pdf.py) was not re-run in this iteration but was 100% green in iter 4 and the relevant code paths are untouched.
success_rate.frontend: 100% on tested flows. Verified: /camera web (pick 1 -> 'Done · 1', pick 2 -> 'Done · 2', tap Done -> /analyzing); onboarding boots cleanly with cleared localStorage; home shows Scan + Upload heroes; /scan scan-open-camera -> /camera; /upload renders Choose PDF / Choose image; /reminder?... shows exactly 5 preset buttons (7d, 3d, 1d, On the day, Custom); /settings renders Save originals toggle (visual).

seed_data_creation: Each backend test class generates its own TEST_DEVICE_<uuid> id and cleans up via DELETE /api/analyses?device_id=. Frontend used localStorage device id 'multi-cam-frontend' per spec — no persistent backend rows created from frontend run (only triggered an analyze with 1x1 PNGs which the LLM returns as 'Unbekannt'; unrelated to assertions).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend AnalyzeRequest accepts both shapes — pages:[] takes priority when truthy. Empty pages array falls through to legacy branch -> 400. Each PDF entry inside pages[] expands up to 5 pages bounded by MAX_TOTAL_PAGES=20. /camera web fallback testIDs: camera-pick-library-web, camera-web-done. Native testIDs (untestable from web): camera-screen, camera-shutter, camera-library, camera-thumb-strip, camera-thumb-remove-{i}, camera-done, camera-flash, camera-close. Pre-existing warnings on web (expo-notifications, shadow*, useNativeDriver) are not regressions. EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL is the correct env key for tests (frontend/.env).
rca_of_issue: No new issues found in iter 5. Only the Settings toggle missing testID is a small testability gap (existed prior to iter 5 — out of scope for this iteration's multi-page feature).
